meaning: adv.忠诚地,如实地,切实遵守地
examples: The events were faithfully recorded in her diary.
He had supported the local team faithfully for 30 years.
When I adapt something I translate from one meaning to another as faithfully as I can.
In 1978, BBC produced a three-part miniseries that tried to adapt the novel more faithfully.
The two men used to jog together, Curseen faithfully running three miles, three days a week.
